          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nfrom datetime import datetime\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n\r\nimport redis.asyncio as redis\r\nfrom fastapi import Depends, FastAPI, HTTPException, Query, status\r\nfrom fastapi.responses import JSONResponse, PlainTextResponse\r\nfrom prometheus_client import CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST, generate_latest\r\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, Field\r\nfrom sqlalchemy import and_, func, select\r\nfrom sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession\r\n\r\nfrom .broker import enqueue_job, get_redis\r\nfrom .config import get_settings\r\nfrom .db import get_session, init_db\r\nfrom .logging import configure_logging, get_logger\r\nfrom .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL\r\nfrom .models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\r\nfrom .state_machine import InvalidStateTransition, transition_state\r\n\r\n\r\nlogger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"api\")\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobCreate(BaseModel):\r\n    type: str\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n    queue: str = \"default\"\r\n    max_attempts: int = Field(3, gt=0)\r\n    run_at: Optional[datetime] = None\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = None\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    id: str\r\n    type: str\r\n    queue: str\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any]\r\n    state: JobState\r\n    created_at: datetime\r\n    updated_at: datetime\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str]\r\n    attempts: int\r\n    max_attempts: int\r\n    next_run_at: Optional[datetime]\r\n    schedule: Optional[str]\r\n    last_error: Optional[str]\r\n    result: Optional[Dict[str, Any]]\r\n    is_enqueued: bool\r\n    cancel_requested: bool\r\n\r\n    @classmethod\r\n    def from_model(cls, job: Job) -> \"JobResponse\":\r\n        return cls(\r\n            id=job.id,\r\n            type=job.type,\r\n            queue=job.queue,\r\n            payload=job.payload,\r\n            state=job.state,\r\n            created_at=job.created_at,\r\n            updated_at=job.updated_at,\r\n            idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n            attempts=job.attempts,\r\n            max_attempts=job.max_attempts,\r\n            next_run_at=job.next_run_at,\r\n            schedule=job.schedule,\r\n            last_error=job.last_error,\r\n            result=job.result,\r\n            is_enqueued=job.is_enqueued,\r\n            cancel_requested=job.cancel_requested,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobCreateResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    job_id: str\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobListResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    items: List[JobResponse]\r\n    next_cursor: Optional[int]\r\n\r\n\r\nclass JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\r\n    id: int\r\n    job_id: str\r\n    ts: datetime\r\n    old_state: Optional[JobState]\r\n    new_state: JobState\r\n    message: str\r\n    metadata: Dict[str, Any]\r\n\r\n    @classmethod\r\n    def from_model(cls, ev: JobEvent) -> \"JobEventResponse\":\r\n        return cls(\r\n            id=ev.id,\r\n            job_id=ev.job_id,\r\n            ts=ev.ts,\r\n            old_state=ev.old_state,\r\n            new_state=ev.new_state,\r\n            message=ev.message,\r\n            metadata=ev.metadata,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n\r\ndef create_app() -> FastAPI:\r\n    app = FastAPI(title=\"MiniQueue API\")\r\n    configure_logging(service=\"api\")\r\n\r\n    @app.on_event(\"startup\")\r\n    async def _startup() -> None:  # pragma: no cover - simple wiring\r\n        await init_db()\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobCreateResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)\r\n    async def create_job(\r\n        req: JobCreate,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobCreateResponse:\r\n        # Idempotency: return existing non-terminal job with same key.\r\n        if req.idempotency_key:\r\n            stmt = select(Job).where(\r\n                and_(\r\n                    Job.idempotency_key == req.idempotency_key,\r\n                    Job.state.in_([JobState.QUEUED, JobState.RUNNING]),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n            existing = (await session.execute(stmt)).scalar_one_or_none()\r\n            if existing:\r\n                return JobCreateResponse(job_id=existing.id)\r\n\r\n        job = Job(\r\n            type=req.type,\r\n            queue=req.queue,\r\n            payload=req.payload,\r\n            max_attempts=req.max_attempts,\r\n            idempotency_key=req.idempotency_key,\r\n            state=JobState.QUEUED,\r\n            is_enqueued=False,\r\n            next_run_at=req.run_at,\r\n        )\r\n        session.add(job)\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n\r\n        if req.run_at is None:\r\n            await enqueue_job(\r\n                job_id=job.id,\r\n                job_type=job.type,\r\n                queue=job.queue,\r\n                idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n            )\r\n            job.is_enqueued = True\r\n            JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\r\n\r\n        await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job created\")\r\n\r\n        return JobCreateResponse(job_id=job.id)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs/{job_id}\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def get_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def cancel_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n\r\n        if job.state == JobState.RUNNING:\r\n            job.cancel_requested = True\r\n            await transition_state(session, job, JobState.RUNNING, \"Cancel requested\")\r\n        elif job.state == JobState.QUEUED:\r\n            # For not-yet-enqueued jobs we can safely mark CANCELED; for already enqueued,\r\n            # workers will observe cancel_requested before execution.\r\n            if not job.is_enqueued:\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.CANCELED, \"Job canceled before enqueue\")\r\n            else:\r\n                job.cancel_requested = True\r\n                await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Cancel requested while queued\")\r\n        else:\r\n            # Other states are treated as no-op.\r\n            pass\r\n\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.post(\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\", response_model=JobResponse)\r\n    async def retry_job(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobResponse:\r\n        job = await session.get(Job, job_id)\r\n        if job is None:\r\n            raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail=\"Job not found\")\r\n\r\n        if job.state not in {JobState.FAILED, JobState.DEAD}:\r\n            raise HTTPException(\r\n                status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,\r\n                detail=\"Retry only allowed for FAILED or DEAD jobs\",\r\n            )\r\n\r\n        job.state = JobState.QUEUED\r\n        job.attempts = 0\r\n        job.last_error = None\r\n        job.next_run_at = None\r\n        job.is_enqueued = True\r\n        await enqueue_job(\r\n            job_id=job.id,\r\n            job_type=job.type,\r\n            queue=job.queue,\r\n            idempotency_key=job.idempotency_key,\r\n        )\r\n        JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job.type, queue=job.queue).inc()\r\n        await transition_state(session, job, JobState.QUEUED, \"Job retried\")\r\n        await session.flush()\r\n        return JobResponse.from_model(job)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs\", response_model=JobListResponse)\r\n    async def list_jobs(\r\n        state: Optional[JobState] = Query(default=None),\r\n        type: Optional[str] = Query(default=None, alias=\"type\"),\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=50, ge=1, le=200),\r\n        cursor: Optional[int] = Query(default=None),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JobListResponse:\r\n        offset = cursor or 0\r\n\r\n        stmt = select(Job).order_by(Job.created_at.desc(), Job.id.desc())\r\n        if state is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(Job.state == state)\r\n        if type is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(Job.type == type)\r\n        stmt = stmt.limit(limit).offset(offset)\r\n\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        jobs = list(result.scalars())\r\n        next_cursor = offset + len(jobs) if len(jobs) == limit else None\r\n        return JobListResponse(\r\n            items=[JobResponse.from_model(j) for j in jobs],\r\n            next_cursor=next_cursor,\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/jobs/{job_id}/events\", response_model=List[JobEventResponse])\r\n    async def get_job_events(\r\n        job_id: str,\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=500),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> List[JobEventResponse]:\r\n        stmt = (\r\n            select(JobEvent)\r\n            .where(JobEvent.job_id == job_id)\r\n            .order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc())\r\n            .limit(limit)\r\n        )\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        events = list(result.scalars())\r\n        return [JobEventResponse.from_model(ev) for ev in events]\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/job_events\", response_model=List[JobEventResponse])\r\n    async def tail_job_events(\r\n        since: Optional[datetime] = Query(default=None),\r\n        limit: int = Query(default=100, ge=1, le=500),\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> List[JobEventResponse]:\r\n        stmt = select(JobEvent)\r\n        if since is not None:\r\n            stmt = stmt.where(JobEvent.ts >= since)\r\n        stmt = stmt.order_by(JobEvent.ts.asc(), JobEvent.id.asc()).limit(limit)\r\n        result = await session.execute(stmt)\r\n        events = list(result.scalars())\r\n        return [JobEventResponse.from_model(ev) for ev in events]\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/metrics\")\r\n    async def metrics() -> PlainTextResponse:\r\n        data = generate_latest()\r\n        return PlainTextResponse(data.decode(\"utf-8\"), media_type=CONTENT_TYPE_LATEST)\r\n\r\n    @app.get(\"/healthz\")\r\n    async def healthz(\r\n        session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_session),\r\n    ) -> JSONResponse:\r\n        redis_ok = False\r\n        db_ok = False\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            client = get_redis()\r\n            pong = await client.ping()\r\n            redis_ok = bool(pong)\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"Redis health check failed\")\r\n\r\n        try:\r\n            await session.execute(select(func.count(Job.id)).limit(1))\r\n            db_ok = True\r\n        except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001\r\n            logger.exception(\"DB health check failed\")\r\n\r\n        status_str = \"ok\" if (redis_ok and db_ok) else \"degraded\"\r\n        return JSONResponse(\r\n            {\r\n                \"status\": status_str,\r\n                \"redis\": redis_ok,\r\n                \"db\": db_ok,\r\n            }\r\n        )\r\n\r\n    return app\r\n\r\n\r\napp = create_app()\r\n\r\n"
        },

          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport asyncio\r\nimport json\r\nimport sys\r\nimport time\r\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\r\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\r\n\r\nimport httpx\r\nimport typer\r\n\r\n\r\napp = typer.Typer(help=\"MiniQueue CLI\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_base_url() -> str:\r\n    return \"http://localhost:8000\"\r\n\r\n\r\nasync def _async_submit(\r\n    client: httpx.AsyncClient,\r\n    job_type: str,\r\n    payload: Dict[str, Any],\r\n    queue: str = \"default\",\r\n    max_attempts: int = 3,\r\n    run_at: Optional[str] = None,\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = None,\r\n) -> str:\r\n    body: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n        \"type\": job_type,\r\n        \"payload\": payload,\r\n        \"queue\": queue,\r\n        \"max_attempts\": max_attempts,\r\n    }\r\n    if run_at:\r\n        body[\"run_at\"] = run_at\r\n    if idempotency_key:\r\n        body[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n    resp = await client.post(\"/jobs\", json=body)\r\n    resp.raise_for_status()\r\n    return resp.json()[\"job_id\"]\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef submit(\r\n    job_type: str = typer.Argument(..., help=\"Job type, e.g. sleep, http_get\"),\r\n    payload: str = typer.Argument(..., help=\"JSON payload or @file.json\"),\r\n    queue: str = typer.Option(\"default\", help=\"Queue name\"),\r\n    max_attempts: int = typer.Option(3, help=\"Maximum attempts\"),\r\n    run_at: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, help=\"RFC3339 timestamp for delayed run\"),\r\n    idempotency_key: Optional[str] = typer.Option(None, help=\"Idempotency key\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Submit a job via the HTTP API.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    if payload.startswith(\"@\"):\r\n        path = payload[1:]\r\n        with open(path, \"r\", encoding=\"utf-8\") as REDACTED            payload_obj = json.load(f)\r\n    else:\r\n        payload_obj = json.loads(payload)\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            job_id = await _async_submit(\r\n                client,\r\n                job_type=job_type,\r\n                payload=payload_obj,\r\n                queue=queue,\r\n                max_attempts=max_attempts,\r\n                run_at=run_at,\r\n                idempotency_key=idempotency_key,\r\n            )\r\n        typer.echo(job_id)\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef status(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Show job status.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            resp = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{job_id}\")\r\n            resp.raise_for_status()\r\n            data = resp.json()\r\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2, sort_keys=True))\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef cancel(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Request cancellation of a job.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            resp = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/cancel\")\r\n            resp.raise_for_status()\r\n            data = resp.json()\r\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2, sort_keys=True))\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef retry(job_id: str) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Retry a FAILED or DEAD job.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            resp = await client.post(f\"/jobs/{job_id}/retry\")\r\n            resp.raise_for_status()\r\n            data = resp.json()\r\n        typer.echo(json.dumps(data, indent=2, sort_keys=True))\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef tail(\r\n    since_seconds: int = typer.Option(30, help=\"How far back to start tailing from\"),\r\n    interval: float = typer.Option(2.0, help=\"Polling interval in seconds\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Tail recent job events via polling.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n    since = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(seconds=since_seconds)  # type: ignore[name-defined]\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        nonlocal since\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            while True:\r\n                params = {\"limit\": 100, \"since\": since.isoformat()}\r\n                resp = await client.get(\"/job_events\", params=params)\r\n                resp.raise_for_status()\r\n                events = resp.json()\r\n                for ev in events:\r\n                    since = datetime.fromisoformat(ev[\"ts\"])\r\n                    typer.echo(\r\n                        f'{ev[\"ts\"]} {ev[\"job_id\"]} {ev[\"old_state\"]}->{ev[\"new_state\"]} {ev[\"message\"]}'\r\n                    )\r\n                await asyncio.sleep(interval)\r\n\r\n    try:\r\n        asyncio.run(_run())\r\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\r\n        typer.echo(\"Stopped.\", err=True)\r\n\r\n\r\\REDACTED()\r\ndef loadtest(\r\n    jobs: int = typer.Option(100, help=\"Number of jobs to submit\"),\r\n    concurrency: int = typer.Option(10, help=\"Number of concurrent submitters\"),\r\n) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Submit many jobs concurrently and report throughput/latency.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    base_url = _get_base_url()\r\n\r\n    async def _run() -> None:\r\n        async with httpx.AsyncClient(base_url=base_url, timeout=10.0) as client:\r\n            start = time.monotonic()\r\n\r\n            sem = asyncio.Semaphore(concurrency)\r\n            job_ids: List[str] = []\r\n\r\n            async def submit_one(i: int) -> None:\r\n                async with sem:\r\n                    payload = {\"seconds\": 0.5}\r\n                    jid = await _async_submit(\r\n                        client,\r\n                        job_type=\"sleep\",\r\n                        payload=payload,\r\n                        queue=\"default\",\r\n                    )\r\n                    job_ids.append(jid)\r\n\r\n            await asyncio.gather(*(submit_one(i) for i in range(jobs)))\r\n\r\n            submitted_at = time.monotonic()\r\n\r\n            async def wait_for(jid: str) -> float:\r\n                t0 = time.monotonic()\r\n                while True:\r\n                    resp = await client.get(f\"/jobs/{jid}\")\r\n                    resp.raise_for_status()\r\n                    data = resp.json()\r\n                    if data[\"state\"] in {\"SUCCEEDED\", \"FAILED\", \"DEAD\", \"CANCELED\"}:\r\n                        return time.monotonic() - t0\r\n                    await asyncio.sleep(0.2)\r\n\r\n            latencies = await asyncio.gather(*(wait_for(jid) for jid in job_ids))\r\n            finished_at = time.monotonic()\r\n\r\n            submit_duration = submitted_at - start\r\n            total_duration = finished_at - start\r\n            throughput = jobs / total_duration if total_duration > 0 else 0.0\r\n\r\n            lat_sorted = sorted(latencies)\r\n            p50 = lat_sorted[int(0.5 * len(lat_sorted))]\r\n            p95 = lat_sorted[int(0.95 * len(lat_sorted)) - 1]\r\n\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Submitted {jobs} jobs in {submit_duration:.2f}s\")\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Total time until completion: {total_duration:.2f}s\")\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Throughput: {throughput:.2f} jobs/s\")\r\n            typer.echo(f\"Latency p50={p50:.2f}s p95={p95:.2f}s\")\r\n\r\n    asyncio.run(_run())\r\n\r\n\r\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\r\n    app()\r\n\r\n"
        },
